fix: verdict-ledger.schema.json (new): top-level append-only array of {step, at, artifact, summary}, entry shape under #/$defs/entry; sprint.schema.json step_log references it via cross-file $ref instead of an inlined duplicate; progress.schema.json untouched. ajv-validated against the live session ledger and sprint_6.json. Commit f9f2af6. package-qa PASS (code-standards N/A — schema-only).
title: Verdict Ledger schema: gates' append shape validates strictly
description: A new verdict-ledger schema defines the append-only array of gate verdicts (step, at, artifact, summary). The session Verdict Ledger and a sprint record's step_log entries share the entry shape; the sprint schema references it rather than duplicating it. progress.schema.json remains the unit-of-work tracker shape. End-to-end: the live session ledger and sprint-6 step_log validate strictly against the new schema.
acceptance_criteria: verdict-ledger.schema.json ships in the Template's schemas
sprint.schema.json step_log entries reference the same entry shape (no duplicated definition)
Src-First: template schemas first, dogfood root mirrors
